query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_TYPE, ENGINE, TABLE_ROWS, DATA_LENGTH FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 49eMgPq5cVu4Eag.root --database fBtCmWxANL94hcDMaWK3iH --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_TYPE, ENGINE, TABLE_ROWS, DATA_LENGTH FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
stdout:
